openparser/rss

  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Types
    • RssFeed
    • RssImage
    • RssItem
    • RssMediaContent
    • RSSParsingError
  • Procs
        fetchRss
      • fetchRss(url: string): RssFeed
        parseRss
      • parseRss(xml: string): RssFeed
        readRss
      • readRss(filePath: string): RssFeed
        toRssXml
      • toRssXml(feed: RssFeed): string

This module provides functionality to parse and generate RSS feeds in Nim. It defines data structures to represent RSS feeds, items, images, and media content, as well as functions to read RSS feeds from files or URLs, parse them from XML strings, and convert them back to XML format.

Types

RssFeed = object
  title*: string
  link*: string
  description*: string
  copyright*: string
  pubDate*: string
  lastBuildDate*: string
  atomSelfLink*: Option[string]
  image*: RssImage
  items*: seq[RssItem]
  ttl*: int
Represents an RSS feed with its metadata and items. 
RssImage = object
  url*: string
  title*: string
  link*: string
Represents the image associated with an RSS feed. 
RssItem = object
  title*: Option[string]
  link*: Option[string]
  description*: Option[string]
  pubDate*: Option[string]
  category*: Option[string]
  guid*: Option[string]
  source*: Option[string]
  mediaContent*: Option[RssMediaContent]
Represents an individual item in an RSS feed. 
RssMediaContent = object
  url*: Option[string]
  mediaType*: Option[string]
  medium*: Option[string]
  height*: Option[int]
  width*: Option[int]
Represents media content associated with an RSS item. 
RSSParsingError = object of CatchableError

Procs

proc fetchRss(url: string): RssFeed {....raises: [ValueError, HttpRequestError,
    LibraryError, Exception, OSError, SslError, IOError, TimeoutError,
    ProtocolError, KeyError, XmlError, RSSParsingError], tags: [RootEffect,
    ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, TimeEffect], forbids: [].}
Fetches an RSS feed from the specified URL and parses it into an RssFeed object. 
proc parseRss(xml: string): RssFeed {....raises: [IOError, OSError, ValueError,
    Exception, XmlError, RSSParsingError], tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect,
    WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Parses the given XML string as an RSS feed and returns an RssFeed object. 
proc readRss(filePath: string): RssFeed {....raises: [IOError, OSError, ValueError,
    Exception, XmlError, RSSParsingError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Reads an RSS feed from the specified file path and parses it into an RssFeed object. 
proc toRssXml(feed: RssFeed): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Converts an RssFeed object back into an XML string representation of the RSS feed.
